name: egycash
description: ECMS Platform — EGYCASH Enterprise Cash Management System

scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/contracts && concurrently -n api,worker,web -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev:worker -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w packages/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run build -w packages/contracts && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/contracts && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.seed: npm run build -w packages/contracts && npm run seed -w apps/api
scripts.gen:permission-matrix: npm run build -w packages/contracts && node scripts/gen-permission-matrix.mjs
scripts.check:permission-matrix: npm run build -w packages/contracts && node scripts/gen-permission-matrix.mjs --check
scripts.check:flag-expiry: npm run build -w packages/contracts && node scripts/check-flag-expiry.mjs
scripts.test:unit: npm run build -w packages/contracts && npm run test:unit -w apps/api && npm run test -w packages/contracts
scripts.test:integration: npm run build -w packages/contracts && npm run test:integration -w apps/api
